feature_summary: Filesタブで .pdf ファイル選択時にBlob URL + iframeでPDFプレビューを表示する機能

criteria_results.criterion: Chrome/Firefox最新版で .pdf ファイル選択時にiframeでPDFが表示される（PDFレンダリングは手動UAT）
criteria_results.evidence: src/components/worktree/PdfPreview.tsx:108-116 returns <iframe src={blobUrl}> when Blob URL is ready. FilePanelContent.tsx:719-730 routes isPdf tabs to PdfPreview. Actual browser rendering reserved for Phase 6 UAT.

criteria_results.criterion: iframeに sandbox='allow-scripts' が設定されている
criteria_results.evidence: src/config/pdf-extensions.ts:51 defines PDF_IFRAME_SANDBOX = 'allow-scripts'. PdfPreview.tsx:111 passes it to iframe sandbox attr. Verified by tests/unit/components/PdfPreview.test.tsx:70-76 ('renders an iframe with sandbox="allow-scripts"... expect(iframe.getAttribute('sandbox')).toBe('allow-scripts')).

criteria_results.criterion: iframeに title='PDF Preview: {filePath}' 相当の属性が設定されている
criteria_results.evidence: PdfPreview.tsx:112 sets title={`PDF Preview: ${filePath}`}. Verified by PdfPreview.test.tsx:74,85 (screen.getByTitle(`PDF Preview: ${defaultProps.filePath}`)).

criteria_results.criterion: 非PDF形式を .pdf 拡張子で開いた際に magic bytes検証でブロックされ INVALID_MAGIC_BYTES エラー応答される（400）
criteria_results.evidence: src/config/pdf-extensions.ts:97-102 validatePdfMagicBytes checks first 5 bytes against %PDF-. route.ts:281-286 returns createErrorResponse('INVALID_MAGIC_BYTES', ...). ERROR_CODE_TO_HTTP_STATUS maps INVALID_MAGIC_BYTES -> 400 (route.ts:78). Verified by tests/unit/api/files-pdf.test.ts:113-126.

criteria_results.criterion: 20MB超過PDFで PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED エラー応答される（413）
criteria_results.evidence: pdf-extensions.ts:27 PDF_MAX_SIZE_BYTES = 20*1024*1024. validatePdfContent (pdf-extensions.ts:110-116) returns size error. route.ts:277-280 returns createErrorResponse('PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED', ...). ERROR_CODE_TO_HTTP_STATUS maps PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED -> 413 (route.ts:86). Verified by files-pdf.test.ts:97-110 (status 413, code PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED).

criteria_results.criterion: next.config.js の CSP frame-src に blob: が追加されている
criteria_results.evidence: next.config.js:74 - "frame-src 'self' blob:" present in CSP header array.

criteria_results.criterion: next.config.js のCSPコメントに DR4-007 撤回経緯（Issue #490 → #673）が記載されている
criteria_results.evidence: next.config.js:72-73 - // Issue #490: HTML/MARP srcdoc (DR4-007: blob: originally excluded) / // Issue #673: blob: added for PDF preview (Blob URL + iframe) — DR4-007 retraction.

criteria_results.criterion: PDFタブでは useFileContentPolling の自動ポーリングが行われない
criteria_results.evidence: src/hooks/useFileContentPolling.ts:50-51 - enabled gated by '!tab.content?.isPdf' with the comment 'Issue #673: PDF tabs disable polling to avoid re-fetching large Base64 payloads'.

criteria_results.criterion: Blob URLのメモリリーク防止: コンポーネントアンマウント時に URL.revokeObjectURL が呼ばれる
criteria_results.evidence: PdfPreview.tsx:68-73 useEffect cleanup calls URL.revokeObjectURL(currentUrl) for the created Blob URL. Verified by PdfPreview.test.tsx mocks for createObjectURL/revokeObjectURL (line 14/34) and explicit revocation tests.

criteria_results.criterion: ファイル切替時に古いBlob URLがrevokeされる
criteria_results.evidence: PdfPreview.tsx:44-74 useEffect depends on [dataUri, filePath]; returning cleanup that revokes currentUrl ensures old URL is revoked when inputs change. Also a 'cancelled' flag prevents setState after unmount. Verified by PdfPreview.test.tsx:113 ('revokes the old blob URL when filePath changes').

criteria_results.criterion: fetch失敗時にエラーUIへフォールバックする
criteria_results.evidence: PdfPreview.tsx:53-66 try/catch sets hasError. Line 76-95 renders error UI with download link (data-testid='pdf-preview-error'). Covered by test file (tdd-result.json: 'fetch failure fallback - all branches covered').

criteria_results.criterion: path-validator によるパストラバーサル攻撃防御が継続適用されている
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/files/[...path]/route.ts:126-138 - isPathSafe() and resolveAndValidateRealPath() invoked in getWorktreeAndValidatePath(). PDF branch (route.ts:268-307) is reached only after these validations. No bypass in PDF flow.

criteria_results.criterion: CLAUDE.md 主要モジュール一覧に src/config/pdf-extensions.ts が追加されている
criteria_results.evidence: CLAUDE.md line 191: `src/config/pdf-extensions.ts` | PDF拡張子・サイズ(20MB)・magic bytes(`%PDF-`)・iframe sandbox定数, isPdfExtension/validatePdfMagicBytes/validatePdfContent (Issue #673). CLAUDE.md line 259: PdfPreview.tsx entry also registered.

criteria_results.criterion: 全既存テスト（6381件）がパスする
criteria_results.evidence: npm run test:unit: Test Files 340 passed, Tests 6381 passed | 7 skipped (6388), Duration 13.54s. Exit code 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Lint・型チェック・ビルドが全て通る
criteria_results.evidence: npm run lint: 'No ESLint warnings or errors' (exit 0). npx tsc --noEmit: exit 0, no output. npm run build: Next.js build succeeded with full route listing (middleware 28.9kB compiled, all routes generated).

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ1: pdf-extensions ユニットテスト検証
test_scenarios_results.evidence: tests/unit/config/pdf-extensions.test.ts included in 38 passing PDF-specific tests (npx vitest run -> Test Files 3 passed, Tests 38 passed).

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ2: ファイル取得API PDF分岐の検証
test_scenarios_results.evidence: tests/unit/api/files-pdf.test.ts covers success path, PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED (413), INVALID_MAGIC_BYTES (400), FILE_NOT_FOUND (ENOENT). All pass.

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ3: PdfPreview コンポーネントの iframe属性・sandbox='allow-scripts'・title属性・Blob URLライフサイクル
test_scenarios_results.evidence: tests/unit/components/PdfPreview.test.tsx explicitly asserts sandbox='allow-scripts', title='PDF Preview: {filePath}', revocation on filePath change, fetch failure fallback. All pass.

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ4: FilePanelContent での isPdf 分岐確認（他Viewerと排他）
test_scenarios_results.evidence: FilePanelContent.tsx:719-730 isPdf branch appears after isImage/isVideo and before isHtml, mutually exclusive (content.isPdf). Test file tests/unit/components/FilePanelContent.test.tsx was modified for this branch and passes as part of 6381 total.

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ5: useFileContentPolling の PDF無効化条件（!tab.content?.isPdf）
test_scenarios_results.evidence: useFileContentPolling.ts:51 enabled=tab.content !== null && !tab.loading && !tab.isDirty && !tab.content?.isPdf. Covered by unit tests passing in the 6381-suite.

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ6: next.config.js CSPコメントと DR4-007撤回根拠の記載
test_scenarios_results.evidence: next.config.js lines 72-74 include both comments and 'frame-src self blob:'.

test_scenarios_results.scenario: シナリオ7: 静的解析・型チェック・ビルド全通過
test_scenarios_results.evidence: Lint (No ESLint warnings or errors), tsc --noEmit (exit 0, no output), next build (success).

notes: All 15 acceptance criteria and 7 test scenarios passed via static code inspection + full vitest suite (6381 passing, 7 pre-existing skips) + lint + tsc + next build. PDF-specific suites: 3 files / 38 tests pass standalone. Actual PDF rendering in Chrome/Firefox is deferred to Phase 6 /uat (manual) per work-plan. stderr output observed during vitest run originates from deliberate negative-case tests (Provider-missing validators, invalid date input) and does not indicate test failure — exit code 0. No regressions detected.
